message:
fix(messaging): make producer close cancellation-retryable

Replace compare_exchange close guard with unconditional store+flush.
The CAS approach had a flaw: if close() was cancelled during flush_inner(),
the closed flag would already be set to true, and subsequent retry calls
would see is_err() and return Ok(()) without completing the flush.

Now close() always sets closed=true (idempotent) and always attempts
flush, ensuring cancelled close operations can be retried to completion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
